bird.name: Gundlach's hawk
bird.summary: Gundlach's hawk (Astur gundlachi) is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae. It was formerly placed in the genus Accipiter.

relations.subject: Gundlach's hawk
relations.evidence: Men and Women Commemorated in the Common Names of Birds|year=2003|publisher=Christopher Helm|location=London|page=152|author2=Watkins, Michael}} It is threatened by habitat loss and human persecution
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Gundlach's hawk
relations.evidence: Gundlach's hawk faces a loss of habitat due to deforestation and logging in Cuba
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
